definition:
στολή, -ῆς, ἡ
 (στέλλω), [in LXX chiefly for בֶּגֶד, also for לְבוּשׁ, etc. ;] 
  1 1, an equipment, an armament (Æsch.). 
   2. Equipment  in clothes, apparel, esp. flowing raiment, a festal robe: (cf. Jon.3:6, Est.8:15, 1Ma.6:15): Mrk.12:38 16:5, Luk.15:22 20:46, Rev.6:11 7:9, 13-14 22:14.†
 (AS)
